rules.name: Edit Scope Isolation
rules.template: Edit ONLY [TARGET_OBJECT]. Preserve [ALL_NON_TARGET_ELEMENTS] with zero deviation.

rules.name: Spatial Anchoring
rules.template: Maintain exact position, scale, rotation, perspective, and bounding box footprint. The replacement must align perfectly to the original silhouette.

rules.name: Geometry + Optics
rules.template: Preserve original camera angle, perspective, depth of field, motion blur (if present). No distortion or flattening.

rules.name: Lighting + Material Fidelity
rules.template: Match original lighting: direction [DIRECTION], intensity [INTENSITY], reflections [REFLECTIONS], specular highlights [HIGHLIGHTS], shadow softness [SHADOW_SOFTNESS], environmental color bleed [COLOR_BLEED].

rules.name: Environmental Interaction
rules.template: Preserve all object interactions: occlusions, overlapping effects (light streaks, glow, particles), transparency. Ensure effects pass through/around object identically.

rules.name: Structural Parity
rules.template: Preserve internal structure/layout. Only modify stylistic layer: [STYLE_CHANGES]. Prevent layout drift.

rules.name: Identity Replacement
rules.template: Remove: [REMOVE_MARKERS]. Apply: [APPLY_MARKERS]. Avoid hybrid artifacts or mixed design languages.

rules.name: Negative Constraints
rules.template: Do NOT alter: [DO_NOT_ALTER]. Do NOT introduce: [DO_NOT_INTRODUCE].

rules.name: Pixel Fidelity
rules.template: Ensure pixel-perfect preservation outside edited region. Zero deviation globally except target object.

rules.name: Photorealism
rules.template: Seamless, photorealistic integration. No visible edit seams or AI artifacts.

rules.name: Consistency Pass
rules.template: Match grain/noise, sharpness, edge blending. Ensure uniformity across entire image.

rules.name: Output Quality Threshold
rules.template: Final image must be indistinguishable from original except for: [TARGET_CHANGE]. Production-grade realism.
